name: @jahrulnr/mcp-ssh-agentic
description: MCP server for agentic passwordless SSH/SCP with ControlMaster connection reuse

scripts.check: node --check src/cli.js src/index.js src/app.js src/util.js src/transport/real.js src/transport/mock.js
scripts.test:mcp: npm run test:mcp:node && npm run test:mcp:npx
scripts.test:all: npm run check && npm run test:unit && npm run test:mcp
